title: The Astronomical Mystery of Time!

scenes.text: Time actually moves differently in space compared to Earth!
Due to gravity, time moves slower the closer you are to a massive object.
This means astronauts ages slightly slower than people on Earth!
The closer to a black hole, the more pronounced this effect becomes!
scenes.label: EXTREME TIME WARP

scenes.text: Follow if you love learning something new.

description: Time doesn’t fly the same in space! Discover how gravity alters our perception of time. Follow for daily facts!
